title: Person
description: A person (researcher) record as exposed by the VU Amsterdam Pure REST web service (Pure API v5.34.3).

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object; prefer the UUID when present.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the person's profile on the Pure Portal.

titles.description: Academic titles held by the person.

gender.description: Classification reference for the person's gender.

staffOrganizationAssociations.description: Associations between the person and organizational units as staff.

identifiers.description: External identifiers (ORCID, Scopus, etc.) related to the person.
